skills.name: article-search
skills.description: Search and retrieve tech news articles from System Report. Supports keyword search across titles, descriptions, and tags. Returns structured JSON with article metadata.

skills.name: exif-metadata-remover
skills.description: Strip EXIF metadata (GPS, camera model, timestamps) from JPEG, PNG, and WebP images using a browser-based tool. 100% client-side — images never leave the device.
